item.title: Version 2026.03.14
item.description:
What's New in 2026.03.14

  • Voice commands: punctuation no longer leaves artifacts — spoken commands like "period" and "comma" now consume adjacent Whisper-added punctuation. Previously "I will be there, period." left a dangling comma; now it produces clean "I will be there."
  • Voice commands: duplicate punctuation fully collapsed — the dedup regex now handles 3+ repeated punctuation marks (e.g. `. ..` → `.`), not just pairs.
  • Voice commands: "open/close parentheses" now recognized — Whisper transcribes the plural form; added "parentheses" as a variant alongside "parenthesis".
  • Command eval: 19/19 cases passing — end-to-end eval (audio → Whisper → formatText) improved from 7/21 (33%) to 19/19 (100%). Updated expected values to match real Whisper output and removed 2 cases where Whisper can't reliably preserve the spoken command (em dash, at sign).

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
